description: Recurring code-health audit for {{repo}} ({{quarter}}). Children TRIAGE the mechanical code-health CI output (.github/workflows/code-health.yml: ruff/vulture, jscpd, pip-audit) rather than re-running tools, plus a judgment-only SOLID review. File one bead per finding. Recommended cadence: quarterly, run via 'bd mol pour code-health-audit --var repo={{repo}} --var quarter={{quarter}}' (persistent, for audit trail).

steps.title: Code-health audit: {{repo}} ({{quarter}})
steps.description: Umbrella for the {{quarter}} code-health audit of {{repo}}. The mechanical pass/fail checks already run in CI (.github/workflows/code-health.yml). These children TRIAGE that CI output - they do NOT re-run the tools. File one bead per finding via the Bug Discovery Protocol; do NOT fix inline unless blocking.

steps.title: DRY triage: review jscpd duplication report for {{repo}}
steps.description: Triage the duplication findings from the CI 'jscpd (copy-paste detector)' job (config: .jscpd.json, gate threshold 1%). Pull the latest jscpd report, review reported clones below the gate, and decide which are worth de-duplicating. Do NOT re-run jscpd yourself - read CI output. Output: ranked list of duplication hotspots (file:line) worth a refactor bead, plus whether the 1% threshold should be tightened.

steps.title: SOLID review: responsibility & coupling in {{repo}}
steps.description: Judgment-only review (no mechanical CI check exists for this). Look for SRP violations (god modules >600 lines), leaky abstractions, and tight coupling. This is the one child that is genuinely a human/agent assessment rather than CI triage. Output: refactor candidates ranked by pain.

steps.title: Dead-code triage: review vulture CI output for {{repo}}
steps.description: Triage findings from the CI 'vulture (dead-code sweep)' job (--min-confidence 80) and the ruff F401 unused-import signals from the 'ruff' job. Read the CI logs; do NOT re-run vulture/ruff. For each reported item, decide remove vs. keep (false positive) with a confidence note. Output: removal candidates with confidence notes, plus any sub-80-confidence vulture items worth a manual look.

steps.title: Dependency-hygiene triage: review pip-audit + outdated CI output for {{repo}}
steps.description: Triage dependency findings from the CI 'pip-audit + outdated' job: pip-audit (CVE scan, hard gate) and 'uv pip list --outdated' (advisory, never fails). Read the CI logs; do NOT re-run the tools. Decide which outdated deps to upgrade and confirm no advisories are quietly accumulating. Output: upgrade/remove plan ranked by risk.
